name: mapper
intent: Add a MapStruct mapper for OrderDto
why: L01/L02 are order-domain mapping learnings (tag + package). L03 is the order-aggregate invariant in the SAME package with NO shared tag — semantically relevant to anyone editing the order domain; only S_path (not tag-equality) catches it. Distractor D01 shares the 'jpa' tag (via stack) but is off-domain in the report package; D07 is a tombstone that shares tag+package and must be filtered.

name: migration
intent: Add a Flyway migration to add a status column to orders
why: L04/L05 are flyway online-safety learnings. L06 (backfill-in-its-own-migration) shares NO flyway tag but lives in the same migration directory — relevant via package, missed by tag-equality.

name: reactive
intent: Add a WebFlux handler for user lookup
why: Reactive blocking-offload (L07) + StepVerifier testing (L08), both in the user package. Everything else is off-domain and recency-newer.
